title: HAHAHHA IT WAS NICE TO BE WITH YALL
author: Mark
message: Heya mentors, gotta let you know that youve left a memorable impact on my first year in uni. Not only from the study sessions but also in the events that helped me find the friendgroup im in today. It's crazy to think that the events yall organised helped me meet so many people (also ill send you a pic of which is my favourite event)
